query: SELECT id, status, retryCount, mcpPending, scheduledAt FROM posts WHERE status = 'scheduled' AND scheduledAt <= NOW() ORDER BY scheduledAt ASC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3F5sJN7FajWtXbb.root --database 3LYkMyiPgdB2gzxf44Hk3M --execute SELECT id, status, retryCount, mcpPending, scheduledAt FROM posts WHERE status = 'scheduled' AND scheduledAt <= NOW() ORDER BY scheduledAt ASC LIMIT 5;
